summary: Phase 1 Salon Booking app: backend APIs (services, stylists, availability, bookings + validations) and full frontend e2e (4-step booking flow + confirmation + reset) all working as specified.
passed: GET /api/services returns 9 seeded services with correct fields
GET /api/stylists returns 3 stylists; ?service_id=svc-beard-sculpt filters to only Michael Voss
GET /api/availability returns 47 slots at 15-min granularity 09:00 to 20:30 (end 21:00) for 30-min service; all available on future empty date
POST /api/bookings creates booking with correct end_time = start_time + duration; returns nested service + stylist
POST /api/bookings rejects past date (400), invalid date format (400), outside-hours slot (400), stylist not offering service (400), overlap (409)
GET /api/bookings/{id} returns booking with nested service + stylist
After booking, overlapping slots in availability flip to available=false; non-overlapping remain true
Frontend home loads with 'Maison Aurelle' header and 4-step stepper
Step 1 services-grid shows 9 service cards; selecting one enables Continue
Step 2 stylists-grid for Sharp Beard Sculpt narrows to 1 (Michael Voss only)
Step 3 date-picker → next month → day click → slots-grid renders 47 slot buttons; selecting a free slot works
Step 4 input-name + input-phone + btn-confirm produces confirmation-screen with reference, service, stylist, date, time, total ($20), name (Jane Doe), phone (+15555550100)
btn-new-booking resets flow back to Step 1 services-grid
No page/console errors during the e2e flow
